data.name: Hentai Age Land
data.detailed_description:
Embark on a calm and enchanting puzzle adventure where every completed level reveals a stunning portrait of a beautiful girl. Sink into a peaceful atmosphere as you carefully fit each piece into place, slowly bringing each image to life.

There’s no need to hurry—no time limits, no stress, just a gentle and relaxing experience. Enjoy smooth, comforting gameplay designed purely for relaxation and pleasure. Whether you’re playing casually to unwind or diving deeper into each puzzle, the game offers soothing visuals and a calming escape you can return to anytime.

Features :

Beautiful artwork to unlock – Progress through levels to reveal elegantly crafted portraits.

Soothing background music – Gentle, ambient sounds create a tranquil experience.

Complete image gallery – View all finished illustrations in high quality whenever you like.

Variety of levels – Explore numerous stages with increasingly engaging puzzles.

Unwind with a relaxing puzzle game that gradually reveals lovely portraits. No pressure, no countdowns—just smooth, calming gameplay and peaceful visuals to enjoy whenever you want.

data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯文*, 捷克文*, 荷蘭文*, 印尼語*, 日文*, 波蘭文*, 簡體中文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 泰文*, 繁體中文*, 烏克蘭文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1+ GHz processor
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
